title: WONDERVERSE PRIME
description: 1.21.5 | 32x Textures | Better Performance | Controller & Steam Deck Support | Multiplayer Friendly | Vanilla Gameplay | Custom Shaders | 3D Elements
body:
![WONDERVERSE PRIME Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/471acd53a105b17e2482c578b3f1f5db2de1333b_0.webp)
Welcome to the official page of the **WONDERVERSE PRIME** modpack, always up-to-date with the **latest version of Minecraft**!

**Enhance graphics without altering gameplay**, ensuring compatibility with any world or server. This modpack introduces several Quality of Life improvements and optimizes performance, allowing Minecraft to run smoother even on low-end devices. It's designed to be **more visually appealing** with shaders, resource packs and mods that focus on improving the game's graphical aspects.

![WONDERVERSE PRIME Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25ec2d907fc17b6f30eb9ad473720721063350d1_0.webp)

**WONDERVERSE PRIME** will always be on the **latest Minecraft version** and it will be released as soon as Fabric and a few other core mods get updated, so everyone can immediately **enjoy the newest features** of Minecraft and enhanced vanilla experience.

There will be more frequent releases, adding more contents and **keeping everything updated**, while doing our best to ensure quality and stability. 

![WONDERVERSE PRIME Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b7de3c11998e66cec5992fc6454b7c49e966492_0.webp)

- Made for the **latest version of Minecraft**
- **99% Vanilla-like** using only mods that don't alter the original gameplay
- Higher resolution graphics with **32x textures** and enhanced GUIs
- Stunning visuals with customized **shaders, animations and 3D elements** (including player skins!)
- **Steam Deck / gamepad support** allowing you to play Minecraft with any controller
- Many vanilla-friendly **Quality of Life improvements** 
- Human-readable **Debug Screen** (F3) with essential information only 
- Planty of **performance optimizations**: no need Optifine anymore
- **Multiplayer-friendly**: join friends and play on any server without limitations
- Upcoming official features, when available, directly from weekly Snapshots;
- **Works everywhere** without limitations
- Built for **Fabric**

![Nitrado Minecraft Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1ca750516d1e190c9dd7d00710395ed3a7c90fb_0.webp)

If you're interested, we use [Nitrado](https://nitrado.lumy.fun) to **play multiplayer** with our community and to **host our servers**. You can choose from a variety of Minecraft options (vanilla, with mods, with plugins, etc.) as well as many other games.

![LUMYVERSE Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10f98d5b01e44a56a7d2263341684ac03b9d6553_0.webp)

Feel free to suggest how we can improve this modpack on our **[Discord](https://discord.lumy.fun/)**.

_We carefully selected all the mods, shaders and resource packs included in WONDERVERSE PRIME. All credits go to the original creators. Minecraft is a trademark of Mojang Synergies AB. Made in Italy._
